steps.title: Use the perimeter ratio
steps.content:
Similar triangles have corresponding sides in the same ratio as their perimeters. From the table, the scale factor from triangle $TUV$ to triangle $XYZ$ is
$$\frac{90}{30}=3$$

steps.title: Scale the side length
steps.content: Segment $TU$ corresponds to segment $XY$, and $TU=9$. $$XY=9\cdot 3=27$$ The answer is C.
